cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.description: Create an account and submit your first report today.

features.title: Features
features.description: Everything you need to report effectively.

hero.title: Report Issues in Your City
hero.description: A fast and secure way to report citizen issues to the municipality.

slide1.title: Documenting Crimes Against Humanity
slide1.subtitle: A secure, permanent archive of war crimes and human rights violations. Every report contributes to the pursuit of justice.

slide2.title: Truth Cannot Be Erased
slide2.subtitle: Survivors, witnesses, and investigators from across the globe unite here to preserve evidence and demand accountability.

slide3.title: Justice Begins With Evidence
slide3.subtitle: From conflict zones to courtrooms, verified documentation is the foundation of justice for victims worldwide.

slides.text: The most important data that have suffered from miss and disinformation in the modern world are war crimes data; this issue has unbelievably side effects, even in AI learning!
Truth is the first casualty of war. We exist to ensure it is never the last — documenting every crime, preserving every testimony, demanding every answer.
When evidence is erased, history is rewritten. When history is rewritten, justice dies. We archive the truth so that justice may live.
Every report filed is a brick in the wall against impunity. Every testimony preserved is a voice that can no longer be silenced.
In the fight between memory and denial, documentation is our most powerful weapon. We do not look away — we record, we verify, we remember.

whyMatters.title: Combating Disinformation, Preserving Truth
whyMatters.subtitle: In an age of information warfare, documented evidence is our strongest weapon against denial and distortion.

card1.title: Combating Disinformation
card1.desc: We fight against the deliberate distortion of historical truth through rigorous documentation, verification, and preservation of evidence.

card2.title: Preserving Truth
card2.desc: Every piece of evidence is permanently archived using secure, immutable storage to ensure that truth survives generations.

card3.title: Supporting Justice
card3.desc: Our documented archive supports legal proceedings, war crimes tribunals, and international courts in their pursuit of accountability.

card4.title: Global Solidarity
card4.desc: We unite survivors, researchers, journalists, and advocates worldwide in a shared mission against impunity.

locations.title: Affected Regions Across the Globe
locations.subtitle: Browse documented conflict zones and regions affected by war crimes and human rights violations.

impactStats.title: Our Global Impact
impactStats.subtitle: Real data from our ever-growing archive of verified documentation.

featured.title: Documented Cases & Stories
featured.subtitle: A selection of verified reports and survivor testimonies from our global archive.

howItWorks.title: From Evidence to Justice
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, secure process for documenting war crimes and contributing to the global pursuit of justice.

step1.title: Submit Evidence
step1.desc: Upload your reports, documents, images, and videos through our secure encrypted platform — anonymously if you choose.

step2.title: Verification & Review
step2.desc: Our expert team of researchers and legal analysts carefully verifies every submission for authenticity and accuracy.

step3.title: Permanent Archive
step3.desc: Verified reports enter our permanent, immutable archive — accessible globally and preserved for future generations.

step4.title: Justice & Accountability
step4.desc: Archived evidence supports international courts, human rights organizations, and truth commissions worldwide.

finalCta.title: Your Voice Can Bring Justice
finalCta.subtitle: If you have witnessed or have evidence of war crimes or human rights violations, your testimony matters. Join us in the fight against impunity.
finalCta.note: All submissions are encrypted and can be made anonymously. We protect your identity at every step.

mission.title: Truth is the Foundation of Justice
mission.p1: ZiWound exists to ensure that no crime against humanity goes undocumented. We provide a secure, permanent, and verifiable archive of war crimes and human rights violations from conflict zones around the world.
mission.p2: By combining cutting-edge technology with rigorous verification, we empower survivors, witnesses, and investigators to preserve evidence that can stand the test of time and the scrutiny of courts.
mission.tagline: For the victims. For justice. For history.

submitCTA.title: Your Voice Can Bring Justice
submitCTA.subtitle: If you have witnessed or have evidence of war crimes or human rights violations, your testimony matters. Submit a report securely and help build the case for justice.
submitCTA.note: All submissions are encrypted and can be made anonymously. We protect your identity at every step.

timeline.title: Recent Documented Events
timeline.subtitle: A chronological record of recently verified incidents and investigations from our global network.

mapTeaser.title: Crimes Documented Across the World
mapTeaser.description: Our archive spans conflict zones and regions affected by human rights violations on nearly every continent. Explore the interactive map to see documented incidents by location, severity, and date.

trustMission.pillar1Desc: Every report is handled with the highest security standards. Whistleblowers and witnesses can submit information safely and anonymously.
trustMission.pillar2Desc: Our team of researchers and legal experts carefully verifies all submitted evidence before it enters the public archive.
trustMission.pillar3Desc: We believe in the power of documented truth to drive legal proceedings, international pressure, and lasting justice for victims.
trustMission.pillar4Desc: A worldwide network of human rights defenders, journalists, and citizens standing together against impunity.

footer.description: A fast and secure way to report issues to the municipality.

about.title: About Us
about.mission: ZiWound is a war crimes documentation platform that enables individuals to securely and confidentially report human rights violations and war crimes. Our goal is to preserve historical memory and ensure accountability.
about.vision: A world where no war crime goes unpunished and the voices of victims are heard.
about.feature1Description: Your reports are protected with the highest security standards.
about.feature2Description: Support for 9 languages for global and inclusive access.
about.feature3Description: Collaboration with human rights organizations and international institutions.
about.feature4Description: Recording complete details along with evidence and geographical location.
about.step1Description: Fill out the report form and upload your evidence.
about.step2Description: Our team reviews and verifies your report.
about.step3Description: The report is published and made available for relevant institutions.
about.ctaDescription: By submitting your report, you help document history and contribute to achieving justice.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need assistance? We're here to help. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.formError: Failed to send message. Please try again.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you shortly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about ZiWound. Can't find what you're looking for? Feel free to contact us.

whatIsZiWound.question: What is ZiWound?
whatIsZiWound.answer: ZiWound is a secure platform for documenting war crimes and human rights violations. We provide a confidential way for individuals to report incidents, upload evidence, and contribute to historical records while maintaining their privacy and security.

isZiWoundFree.question: Is ZiWound free to use?
isZiWoundFree.answer: Yes, ZiWound is completely free for all users. We are a non-profit initiative dedicated to documenting war crimes and ensuring accountability. There are no fees for submitting reports or accessing public information.

whoCanUse.question: Who can use ZiWound?
whoCanUse.answer: Anyone can use ZiWound to submit reports about war crimes or human rights violations they have witnessed or experienced. We welcome reports from victims, witnesses, journalists, researchers, and human rights organizations.

howToReport.question: How do I submit a report?
howToReport.answer: To submit a report, create an account or log in, then click 'New Report' in the navigation menu. Fill out the form with details about the incident, including date, location, description, and any evidence you have. You can save your progress and return later if needed.

whatEvidence.question: What type of evidence can I upload?
whatEvidence.answer: You can upload various types of evidence including photos, videos, audio recordings, documents, and location data. We support common formats like JPG, PNG, MP4, MP3, PDF, and DOC. All files are securely stored and encrypted.

anonymousReport.question: Can I submit an anonymous report?
anonymousReport.answer: While we encourage users to create accounts for better communication and follow-up, we understand that anonymity may be necessary for safety reasons. You can contact us directly through our secure channels if you need to submit information anonymously.

reportStatus.question: How can I check the status of my report?
reportStatus.answer: Once you submit a report, you can track its status in the 'My Reports' section of your account. Reports go through several stages: Pending (awaiting review), In Review (being verified), Approved (published), or Rejected (with explanation).

dataSecurity.question: How is my data secured?
dataSecurity.answer: We use industry-standard encryption for all data transmission and storage. Your personal information is kept confidential and never shared with third parties without your consent. Our servers are hosted in secure facilities with strict access controls.

whoSeesReport.question: Who will see my report?
whoSeesReport.answer: Your report is only visible to authorized administrators and verified partner organizations working on war crimes documentation. Personal identifying information is redacted from public-facing documents unless you explicitly choose to share it.

dataRetention.question: How long do you keep my data?
dataRetention.answer: We retain reports and associated data indefinitely for historical documentation purposes. However, you can request deletion of your personal account information at any time. Report content may be retained even if personal data is removed.

supportedLanguages.question: What languages does ZiWound support?
supportedLanguages.answer: ZiWound currently supports 9 languages: Persian (Farsi), English, Arabic, Chinese, Portuguese, Spanish, Dutch, Turkish, and Russian. We are continuously working to add more languages to make the platform accessible to everyone.

mobileFriendly.question: Is ZiWound mobile-friendly?
mobileFriendly.answer: Yes, ZiWound is fully responsive and works on all devices including smartphones and tablets. You can submit reports, upload photos, and access all features from your mobile browser without needing to download an app.

browserSupport.question: Which browsers are supported?
browserSupport.answer: ZiWound works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience and security. Internet Explorer is not supported.

faq.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or browse the categories above.
faq.contactUsPrompt: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our team is here to help.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us when creating an account, submitting reports, or contacting us. This may include your name, email address, and any content you choose to share in your reports. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and usage of our services.
privacy.section2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to process and verify reports, to communicate with you, and to ensure the security of our platform. Your personal information is never sold to third parties.
privacy.section3Content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard protocols.
privacy.section4Content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also request a copy of your data or object to certain processing activities. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information below.
privacy.contactContent: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@ziwound.org or through our contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using our platform
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using ZiWound, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and such modifications shall be effective immediately upon posting.
terms.section2Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and truthful information when submitting reports and to use the platform only for lawful purposes.
terms.section3Content: By submitting content to ZiWound, you grant us a non-exclusive license to use, store, and process that content for the purposes of operating and improving our services. You represent that you have the right to submit such content and that it does not violate any third-party rights.
terms.section4Content: ZiWound and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or relating to your use of the platform. We make no warranties about the accuracy or completeness of information on the platform.
terms.contactContent: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@ziwound.org or through our contact page.
